title: Repair a TLS server chain deployment
prompt: Fix bin/tls-chain-repair so it diagnoses the supplied leaf, intermediate candidates, trust roots, requested DNS name, fixed validation time, and current server bundle order, then deploys the valid chain in TLS serving order. The served bundle must contain the leaf followed by its intermediate(s); it must not contain a trust root or private-key material. Keep the existing CLI and diagnostic output contract. Validation must use the supplied epoch, trust store, and hostname, and a failed check must leave the current bundle unchanged. On success, preserve the prior bundle in the rollback artifact and write the deterministic rollback document before atomically replacing the served bundle. The command and tests must remain offline and deterministic. Do not modify the protected test.
